goal_text: Task 12798: You want to find and it should serve portuguese food. You don't care about the price range. Don't go for the first venue the system offers you, ask if there is anything else. You want to know the address and phone number of the venue.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
